title: RotaryMachineAxisConfiguration Object
description: A MachineAxisConfiguration holding settings specific to rotary axes.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: deleteMe
methods.description: Delete this axis configuration from the controller configuration.

properties.name: coordinate
properties.description: Coordinate to use for post processing.

properties.name: isReversed
properties.description: Does the axis move in the opposite direction to usual. For rotary axes this would mean it uses the left hand rule, and for linear axes is moves in the opposite direction.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: maxNormalSpeed
properties.description: Specifies the maximum normal speed for this axis. This would be called feedrate for a linear axis or rotary speed for a rotary axis. Units are cm/s for linear axes or rad/s for rotary axes.

properties.name: maxRapidSpeed
properties.description: Specifies the maximum rapid speed for this axis. This would be called feedrate for a linear axis or rotary speed for a rotary axis. Units are cm/s for linear axes or rad/s for rotary axes.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: partId
properties.description: ID of the part in the KinematicsMachineElement that this axis configuration modifies.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Specify when to reset the initial axis position.

properties.name: rotaryPreference
properties.description: Specify the preferred angle direction at the beginning of an operation.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of this axis configuration. Use this to inform a cast to the derived types.

properties.name: useToolCenterPointControl
properties.description: Specify if the axis supports Tool Center Point Control (TCP).

properties.name: wrapAroundAtRange
properties.description: Specify the range that the axis value wraps around for unlimited axes. If there are no wrap around limits then wrapAroundAtRange is infinite. Units are radians.

classType.title: RotaryMachineAxisConfiguration.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

deleteMe.title: RotaryMachineAxisConfiguration.deleteMe Method
deleteMe.description: Delete this axis configuration from the controller configuration.

coordinate.title: RotaryMachineAxisConfiguration.coordinate Property
coordinate.description: Coordinate to use for post processing.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = rotaryMachineAxisConfiguration_var.coordinate

# Set the value of the property.
rotaryMachineAxisConfiguration_var.coordinate = propertyValue
